overall.description: Aerial drone footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the Badlands desert region. The camera smoothly orbits a massive red rock mesa with winding highways, revealing an Arasaka industrial facility carved into the cliffside. The scene transitions from highway overpasses to panoramic views of the arid canyon landscape with distant mountains and a dam.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway interchange with distant industrial structures

events.description: camera begins ascending while banking left around the mesa

agents.ego_description: piloting drone camera along highway corridor approaching red rock formation

entered.detail: multi-lane highway viaduct stretching across the desert valley
tall cylindrical structure visible on the horizon against the sky
massive layered sandstone formation with steep cliff faces

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an aerial view of a desert highway cutting through arid badlands. The camera moves forward toward a massive red rock mesa on the left, with a distant industrial tower visible on the horizon. The highway overpass dominates the center of the frame as the drone begins to ascend and bank left.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain road carved into cliff face

events.description: view shifts from open highway to close proximity of cliff face with switchback roads
Arasaka industrial building with corporate logo becomes visible on cliff side

agents.ego_description: circling the mesa to reveal the switchback road system and cliff-top installations

entered.detail: winding two-lane highway carved into the cliffside with multiple hairpin turns
massive industrial structure with white corporate logo painted on dark facade

segments.scene_description: The camera orbits closer to the red rock mesa, revealing a dramatic switchback road carved into the cliff face. As the drone ascends, an Arasaka industrial facility with its distinctive corporate logo comes into view on the left, built directly into the rock formation. The perspective emphasizes the vertical scale of the cliffs and the engineering of the mountain road.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff-top industrial complex overlooking badlands reservoir

events.description: camera clears the cliff edge revealing panoramic view of distant dam and water reservoir
slight lens flare as camera angles toward the sun reflecting off the water

agents.ego_description: panning across the landscape to showcase the relationship between the facility and the surrounding badlands

entered.detail: large concrete dam holding back a blue water reservoir in the canyon
hazy mountain peaks with snow caps visible on the horizon
concrete observation deck with palm trees built on the mesa summit

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a sweeping panoramic view from the cliff top, showing the Arasaka facility in the foreground with a massive dam and reservoir visible in the distant canyon. The camera pans left to showcase the vastness of the badlands, with mountain ranges fading into the hazy horizon. The scene emphasizes the isolation and scale of the industrial installation within the desert wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial progression from a desolate desert highway toward a massive industrial installation perched atop a red rock mesa. It begins by gliding over an arid highway overpass, moving forward as the camera ascends and banks left toward a distant industrial tower on the horizon. As the drone orbits closer to the mesa, the view shifts to reveal a dramatic switchback road carved into the cliff face and an Arasaka industrial facility built directly into the rock. The perspective then expands from the vertical scale of the cliffs into a sweeping panoramic view from the summit, placing the corporate facility in the foreground. Finally, the camera pans left to showcase a massive dam and reservoir nestled within the distant canyon, with mountain ranges fading into a hazy, isolated horizon.
